name: Nikron Technologies, Inc.
summary: Nikron Technologies, Inc., a natural resource company, focuses on heavy oil recovery from mature onshore U.S. fields. The company intends to acquire leases on heavy oil reserves, directly own and operate the recovery facilities, and sell the extracted crude oil product. The company was formerly known as CYR, Inc. and changed its name to Nikron Technologies, Inc. in October 2000 to reflect its current business activities. Nikron Technologies, Inc. was founded in 1987 and is based in Topeka, Kansas.
